files_created.purpose: DTO for PetType schema: id (int), name (string)
DTO for Pet schema: id, name, birthDate, type (PetType), ownerId, visits (List<Visit>)
DTO for Owner schema: id, firstName, lastName, address, city, telephone, pets (List<Pet>)
MicroProfile REST Client interface with @RegisterRestClient(configKey='petclinic') and all 7 GET endpoints
Quarkus MCP server with @Tool methods wrapping each REST endpoint, returning ToolResponse with TextContent
Quarkus test verifying listPetTypes and error handling in getPet

files_modified.changes: Added sidecar container petclinic-mcp with image petclinic-mcp:latest exposing containerPort 8888

notes: All 7 GET endpoints implemented in PetclinicService and wrapped as @Tool methods in PetclinicMcpServer
ObjectMapper injected via @Inject, not instantiated directly
No throws declared on @Tool methods; exceptions caught and returned as ToolResponse.error()
pom.xml unchanged — all required dependencies already present
